CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. EVAN SMITH, Esq. of Brodsky & Smith (tel: 877-534-2590) for Plaintiff.
Atty. WILLIAM DELGADO, Esq. of DTO Law (tel: 213-335-6999) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT COCOCARE PRODUCTS, INC.'s Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications as follows:

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without prejudice. The parties appear to agree that "the satisfaction of notice requirements" is an element of a Proposition 65 claim. (Cmplt. 6:10.) The only notice mentioned in the complaint is one given "[o]n January 27, 2023." (Id. at 6:26-7:14.) However, plaintiff's opposition says she issued a "Notice of Withdrawal" a week later, on February 2, 2023. (Opp. 2:15-19.) Plaintiff's complaint - filed December 27, 2023 - might have clarified her earlier filings, but did not. (Id. at 6:26-7:14.) Thus, the complaint does not plead the notice element of a Proposition 65 claim.
Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court Reporter: Cheri Bullock, CSR# 4714 (tel: 661-645-4048/e-mail: cheridbullock@gmail.com)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2024 Amended
